title: Huawei S310S-8P4UN2X 2.5G Cloud PoE Switch
description: Huawei S310S-8P4UN2X is a reliable managed cloud L2+ PoE switch with a switching capacity of 76Gbps , (8) Gbit PoE+ ports , (4) 2.5G PoE++ ports and (2) SFP+ slots . It supports management via a local web interface as well as cloud management ( eKit SNC / eKit mobile app ). The maximum power consumption is 20.8W (without PoE load) (8) Gbit PoE+ ports , (4) 2.5G PoE++ ports and (2) SFP+ slots PoE 802.3af/at/bt with a total budget of 125W Perpetual PoE - ensures uninterrupted power supply to connected PoE devices even during switch restarts or upgrades Huawei Online Upgrade Platform (HOUP) - automatic one-click updates Passive cooling - silent operation, suitable for office environments L2+ functions: static and policy-based routing, ARP, DHCP Protection against DoS attacks and other security features Automatic loop prevention, VLAN, QoS, DHCP/IGMP snooping, link aggregation Device Power adapter and cable Grounding cable Rack mounts Rubber feet
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (8) 10/100/1000Mbps + (4) 100/1000/2500Mbps Optical interfaces (2) 1G/2.5G/10G Power Power type DC connector PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at, 802.3bt PoE Out ports 12 PoE budget [W] 125 Max. power consumption [W] 160 Power via connector/terminal 54 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Design Rackmount "U" positions 1 Fans No Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset, mode Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 45 Weight [g] 2510 Width [mm] 250 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 180 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 76 MAC address table 16000 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 56
